input.background: Figure 11.6 displays stemplots for three data sets.
input.question: Which of these data sets can support t procedures?

output.answer: - Stemplot A has a positive skew and outlier. It has only six observations. In this situation, $t$ procedures should be avoided.

data_set_1.value: Values from the first stemplot (not explicitly provided in the problem)
data_set_1.description: The first data set displayed in the stemplot.

data_set_2.value: Values from the second stemplot (not explicitly provided in the problem)
data_set_2.description: The second data set displayed in the stemplot.

data_set_3.value: Values from the third stemplot (not explicitly provided in the problem)
data_set_3.description: The third data set displayed in the stemplot.

meta_info.caption: Can a t procedure be used?
